name: Bad Omens
instructions: Put your deck into your discard pile. Look through it and put 2 Coppers from it onto your deck (or reveal you can't).

name: Bard
instructions:
+$2
Receive a Boon.

name: Bat
instructions:
Trash up to 2 cards from your hand. If you trashed at least one, exchange this for a Vampire.
(This is not in the Supply.)

name: Blessed Village
instructions:
+1 Card
+2 Actions
-----
When you gain this, take a Boon. Receive it now or at the start of your next turn.

name: Boons
instructions: Setup: If any Kingdom cards being used have the Fate type, shuffle the Boons and put them near the Supply, and put the Will-o'-Wisp pile near the Supply also.

name: Cemetery
instructions:
2 VP
-----
When you gain this, trash up to 4 cards from your hand.
Heirloom: Haunted Mirror

name: Changeling
instructions:
Trash this. Gain a copy of a card you have in play.
-----
In games using this, when you gain a card costing $3 or more, you may exchange it for a Changeling.

name: Cobbler
instructions: At the start of your next turn, gain a card to your hand costing up to $4.

name: Conclave
instructions:
+$2
You may play an Action card from your hand that you don't have a copy of in play. If you do, +1 Action.

name: Crypt
instructions: Set aside any number of non-Duration Treasures you have in play, face down (under this). While any remain, at the start of each of your turns, put one of them into your hand.

name: Cursed Gold
instructions:
$3
Gain a Curse.

name: Cursed Village
instructions:
+2 Actions
Draw until you have 6 cards in hand.
-----
When you gain this, receive a Hex.

name: Deluded
instructions: At the start of your Buy phase, return this, and you can't buy Actions this turn.

name: Delusion
instructions: If you don't have Deluded or Envious, take Deluded.

name: Den of Sin
instructions:
At the start of your next turn, +2 Cards.
-----
This is gained to your hand (instead of your discard pile).

name: Devil's Workshop
Druid
instructions:
+1 Buy
Receive one of the set-aside Boons (leaving it there).
-----
Setup: Set aside the top 3 Boons face up.

name: Envious
instructions: At the start of your Buy phase, return this, and Silver and Gold make $1 this turn.

name: Envy
instructions: If you don't have Deluded or Envious, take Envious.

name: Exorcist
instructions: Trash a card from your hand. Gain a cheaper Spirit from one of the Spirit piles.

name: Faithful Hound
instructions:
+2 Cards
-----
When you discard this other than during Clean-up, you may set it aside, and put it into your hand at end of turn.

name: Famine
instructions: Reveal the top 3 cards of your deck. Discard the Actions. Shuffle the rest into your deck.

name: Fear
instructions: If you have at least 5 cards in hand, discard an Action or Treasure (or reveal you can't).

name: Fool
instructions:
If you aren't the player with Lost in the Woods: take it, take 3 Boons, and receive the Boons in any order.
Heirloom: Lucky Coin

name: Ghost
instructions:
Reveal cards from your deck until you reveal an Action. Discard the other cards and set aside the Action. At the start of your next turn, play it twice.
(This is not in the Supply.)

name: Ghost Town
instructions:
At the start of your next turn, +1 Card and +1 Action.
-----
This is gained to your hand (instead of your discard pile).

name: Goat
instructions:
$1
You may trash a card from your hand.

name: Greed
instructions: Gain a Copper onto your deck.

name: Guardian
instructions:
At the start of your next turn, +$1.
 Until then, when another player plays an Attack card, it doesn't affect you.
-----
This is gained to your hand (instead of your discard pile).

name: Haunted Mirror
instructions:
$1
-----
When you trash this, you may discard an Action card, to gain a Ghost.

name: Haunting
instructions: If you have at least 4 cards in hand, put one of them onto your deck.

name: Hexes
instructions: Setup: If any Kingdom cards being used have the Doom type, shuffle the Hexes and put them near the Supply, and put Deluded/Envious and Miserable/Twice Miserable near the Supply also.

name: Idol
instructions:
$2
If you have an odd number of Idols in play (counting this), receive a Boon; otherwise, each other player gains a Curse.

name: Imp
instructions:
+2 Cards
You may play an Action card from your hand that you don't have a copy of in play.
(This is not in the Supply.)

name: Leprechaun
instructions: Gain a Gold. If you have exactly 7 cards in play, gain a Wish. Otherwise, receive a Hex.

name: Locusts
instructions: Trash the top card of your deck. If it's Copper or Estate, gain a Curse. Otherwise, gain a cheaper card that shares a type with it.

name: Lost in the Woods
instructions: At the start of your turn, you may discard a card to receive a Boon.

name: Lucky Coin
instructions:
$1
Gain a Silver.

name: Magic Lamp
instructions:
$1
If there are at least 6 cards that you have exactly 1 copy of in play (counting this), trash this. If you did, gain 3 Wishes.

name: Miserable
instructions: -2 VP

name: Misery
instructions: If this is your first Misery this game, take Miserable. Otherwise, flip it over to Twice Miserable.

name: Monastery
instructions: For each card you've gained this turn, you may trash a card from your hand or a Copper you have in play.

name: Necromancer
instructions:
Choose a face up, non-Duration Action card in the trash. Turn it face down for the turn, and play it, leaving it there.
-----
Setup: Put the 3 Zombies into the trash.

name: Night Watchman
instructions:
Look at the top 5 cards of your deck, discard any number, and put the rest back in any order.
-----
This is gained to your hand (instead of your discard pile).

name: Pasture
instructions:
$1
-----
Worth 1 VP per Estate you have.

name: Pixie
instructions:
+1 Card
+1 Action
Discard the top Boon. You may trash this to receive that Boon twice.
Heirloom: Goat

name: Plague
instructions: Gain a Curse to your hand.

name: Pooka
instructions:
You may trash a Treasure other than Cursed Gold from your hand, for +4 Cards.
Heirloom: Cursed Gold

name: Pouch
instructions:
$1
+1 Buy

name: Poverty
instructions: Discard down to 3 cards in hand.

name: Raider
instructions:
Each other player with 5 or more cards in hand discards a copy of a card you have in play (or reveals they can't).
At the start of your next turn, +$3.

name: Sacred Grove
instructions:
+1 Buy
+$3
Receive a Boon. If it doesn't give +$1, each other player may receive it.

name: Secret Cave
instructions:
+1 Card
+1 Action
You may discard 3 cards. If you did, then at the start of your next turn, +$3.
Heirloom: Magic Lamp

name: Shepherd
instructions:
+1 Action
Discard any number of Victory cards, revealing them. +2 Cards per card discarded.
Heirloom: Pasture

name: Skulk
instructions:
+1 Buy
Each other player receives the next Hex.
-----
When you gain this, gain a Gold.

name: The Earth's Gift
instructions: You may discard a Treasure to gain a card costing up to $4.

name: The Field's Gift
instructions:
+1 Action
+$1
(Keep this until Clean-up.)

name: The Flame's Gift
instructions: You may trash a card from your hand.

name: The Forest's Gift
instructions:
+1 Buy
+$1
(Keep this until Clean-up.)

name: The Moon's Gift
instructions: Look through your discard pile. You may put a card from it onto your deck.

name: The Mountain's Gift
instructions: Gain a Silver.

name: The River's Gift
instructions:
+1 Card at the end of this turn.
(Keep this until Clean-up.)

name: The Sea's Gift
instructions: +1 Card

name: The Sky's Gift
instructions: You may discard 3 cards to gain a Gold.

name: The Sun's Gift
instructions: Look at the top 4 cards of your deck. Discard any number of them and put the rest back in any order.

name: The Swamp's Gift
instructions: Gain a Will-o'-Wisp.

name: The Wind's Gift
instructions:
+2 Cards
Discard 2 cards.

name: Tormentor
instructions:
+$2
If you have no other cards in play, gain an Imp. Otherwise, each other player receives the next Hex.

name: Tracker
instructions:
+$1
This turn, when you gain a card, you may put it onto your deck. Receive a Boon.
Heirloom: Pouch

name: Tragic Hero
instructions:
+3 Cards
+1 Buy
If you have 8 or more cards in hand (after drawing), trash this and gain a Treasure.

name: Twice Miserable
instructions: -4 VP

name: Vampire
instructions:
Each other player receives the next Hex.
 Gain a card costing up to $5 other than a Vampire.
Exchange this for a Bat.

name: War
instructions: Reveal cards from your deck until revealing one costing $3 or $4. Trash it and discard the rest.

name: Werewolf
instructions: If it's your Night phase, each other player receives the next Hex. Otherwise, +3 Cards.

name: Will-o'-Wisp
instructions:
+1 Card
+1 Action
Reveal the top card of your deck. If it costs $2 or less, put it into your hand.
(This is not in the Supply.)

name: Wish
instructions:
+1 Action
Return this to its pile. If you did, gain a card to your hand costing up to $6.
(This is not in the Supply.)

name: Zombie Apprentice
instructions: You may trash an Action card from your hand for +3 Cards and +1 Action.

name: Zombie Mason
instructions: Trash the top card of your deck. You may gain a card costing up to $1 more than it.

name: Zombie Spy
instructions:
+1 Card
+1 Action
Look at the top card of your deck. Discard it or put it back.
